channel.title: BayesianLaterality on Øystein Sørensen
channel.description: Recent content in BayesianLaterality on Øystein Sørensen

item.title: BayesianLaterality - Predict Brain Asymmetry Based on Handedness and Dichotic Listening
item.description: This R package contains functions for estimating whether a subject is left- or right-dominant for language processing based on the results of dichotic listening experiments and information about handedness.

item.title: From observed laterality to latent hemispheric differences: Revisiting the inference problem
item.description: This paper considers predicting whether people are right or left brain dominant for language processing, based on their result in dichotic listening experiments as well as their handedness. Published in Laterality
